title: Editable detail pane + inline editing + palette edit actions
description: Replace the read-only detail stub with an EDITABLE detail view-model (internal/tui/view_detail.go): render metadata (status, priority, owner, parent epic, blockers, target_date), description, acceptance, notes (port buildDetailContent from model.go); inline field edits (status/owner/priority/parent/labels/target_date) via field-cycle + textinput, writing through tick.NewStore(path).WriteAs. Move doApprove/doReject out of model.go into here. Add shared edit funcs in internal/tui/edit.go (over the store) and register the palette EDIT actions (close/reopen/reassign/set status/priority/add blocker/approve/reject) by calling them -- a localized addition to palette.go. Adaptive detail behavior (design section 6): peek in 3-pane, swap-on-Enter in 2-pane, full in 1-pane (via the layout seam in app.go). Files: internal/tui/view_detail.go (new), internal/tui/edit.go (new), tests; localized edits to palette.go + app.go.
acceptance_criteria: unit: each inline edit yields expected Tick and calls store.WriteAs (asserted vs temp .tick); approve/reject reproduce current behavior; teatest golden: edit status inline reflects in frame; on medium width Enter swaps to detail, Esc returns; edited tick re-read matches
